name: Peach Custard Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 2 cups peaches, peeled and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the eggs to blend.
2. In a 3-4 quart saucepan, whisk flour, 1 cup of the sugar, and milk until smooth. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring often until boiling, about 8 minutes.
3. Whisking rapidly, pour the hot mixture into the eggs. This will destroy any salmonella bacteria.
4. In a blender, puree peaches with lemon juice and remaining 1/2 cup sugar.
5. Stir the purée into the cooked mixture and chill, covered, until cold, about 2 hours or up to a day.
6. Stir in cream and vanilla extract.
7. Freeze the peach mixture in a regular or electric ice cream maker according to manufacturer's directions.
8. Serve when softly frozen or package airtight and store in the freezer up to 2 weeks. Let soften at room temperature about 10 minutes before scooping.
